A small wall fan in the bunk bed room was pointless but the double bed room had a ceiling fan.  Fridge had an incredible freezer.  Unsure about the rubbish as we overfilled the small bins. Nothing to complain about, handy to be nearby a lot of shops and food places.  Front area had a table for hanging out and a rail for hanging wet clothing.

Friendly staff, had a great experience with my family, holiday was awesome, hoping the cyclone has minimal impact. Thanks guys 🙂

I’ll start by saying this park is fantastic. Beautiful spot, great for families and the staff are lovely. We have stayed here multiple times, however this will be that last unfortunately.
We stayed in the family studio cabins which were lovely and brand new, really nice cabins and perfect spot. However, one of the most important aspects of a holiday is a good nights sleep after massive busy days and sad to say the beds were absolutely horrible. And the pillows were even worse. The double bed was soo soft and sinky, the single mattresses for the bunks were like sleeping on cement but really the worst aspect was the pillows which were like rocks and all 8 of us (in two cabins) just ended up sleeping with no pillows.
We asked for different pillows but they didn’t have any.
I’m not normally fussy but having come from SeaWorld resort the week before and sleeping amazingly on their beds and pillows it’s a pretty big factor.
Also our rooms were meant to be serviced at the halfway point of our stay but instead of cleaning the toilets or floors etc, replenishing toilet papers etc all they did was drop off towels, so that area needs attention also.
I hope they take this feedback on board because I’d hate for others to not want to come back for the same reason when this really is a great park and very well run! :)

This holiday park is our families favourite place in the world. The pools, kids club, bar and staff are literally perfect.

Accommodation is spacious and comfortable with everything a family needs.

Location is absolutely prime, harbour town shops are next door, 24hr fast food joints a walk away and Surfers Paradise and all the beaches only 10 minutes drive.

We can't wait to be back

We absolutely love Treasure Island and have just returned from our third stay. The resort offers plenty of activities for the kids, though they usually end up spending most of their time in the pool or spa. I really appreciate the variety of activities available, as well as the delicious food from the restaurant. The only reason I’ve given 4 stars instead of 5 is that some of the facilities could benefit from an upgrade, but they are still perfectly functional. Overall, it's a fantastic place for a family getaway!

Great caravan park. Clean amenities, the wifi worked quite a bit, the bistro is a nice area to have a cold drink and relax. The camp kitchen is well laid out.
There's a bus stop out near the front to take to the beach very easily.
We'd come back if passing through. Thanks team 👍

really nice rooms,  heaps of activities and shopping super close

Absolutely love this park and can't wait to come back, all the staff are super friendly, all 3 pools are amazing the spas are awesome, there was so much to do close to everything you need.

Great service and excellent customer service

I've stayed here twice in the last 12 years.
I really must go more often.
Great location,  facilities & always kind & helpful staff.

We just returned from our holiday here! So much to do around the park to keep the kids entertained, staff very friendly, good prices in the cafe, location great- so close to everything, so many options for a swim and nothing was ever a problem for any staff member! We will be back!

I stay every Monday night for business trip, studio unit is perfect.
Reid in the bistro is the best, happiest and loveliest person ever, always helpful. A real asset to Treasure Island.
Thank u so much.

The park was a lot smaller than I imagined and a good 30min bus and then tram ride to surfers paradise.

The room was nice and clean however no hob to cook.

It's a race to get to a shaded area in the pools and after 8pm everything is shut. There is nothing to for the kids after that time.

If it had a disco on every night from 8-10pm it would have been great.

We come here every year for a family holiday from nsw. Great for the kids. Multiple swimming pools. activities for the kids pedal cart hire. Pet friendly nice BBQ areas they have different sized huts depending how big your family is. They also have caravan spaces. Also very close to coles. Love this place

Oh my what a fabulous  place to stay.most days i didn't leave the park.So much to do.All staff absolutely  lovely and the cabins are more like a house.The bed was so soft and area real quiet.what more can I say 10/10

Amazing place for families. Highly recommend. We were 3 adults 3 kids. It was perfect.

The studio room was spacious however there was no space for our luggage. The pools were good.

Great location, great facilities and a great group of staff. Perfect destination for a family base on your next Gold Coast getaway.

Absolutely disgusting service!!!! Yesterday I reviewed this place for a potential accomodation. I showed my husband and today I went to make the booking and the price had increased. I couldn't find a email to contact them and it states contact one of our 'friendly sales team' on the spot. Went through the main switch board, spoke to one staff, oh yes it has increased, let me put you thorough the park and they can fix it for you. So they did, I got I can't do anything for you. When I said that is not ok and its surge pricing, from my history. I was told i'm over reacting, when I am simply asking for a explanation of why it cant be fixed.
To end it, I was hug up on..................super friendly!

I am a NRMA member and have insurance with NRMA.......guess what is being cancelled? I will not support these kind of businesses

Had the most amazing family getaway recently staying here.  We loved that we didn’t need to leave the park at all. So many fun activities to do for the kids and even adults.  Pools were amazing and cabin was great.  Kids haven’t stopped talking about how fun their holiday was and asking when we are returning.    Can’t wait to book this in again. Have recommended to family and friends.

Bistro was great last night. Steak cooked perfectly, affordable meals.

I recommend this place for families and children because they have activities for kids, swimming pools etc. If you want a place to stay in the Gold Coast I recommend this place to everyone. ❤️ ❤️

The best thing about this place is the water slides. We arrived at 3 our room wasn't ready. We never got an apology. We got a free go cart ride. Only to be told by a very rude younger girl that works in the bar that we only have go carts on the hour. I just found her to be quite rude. I just came off a cruise they are the nicest people. People pay a small fortune to stay at these places. the staff should be grateful to have a Job.

We stayed here 5 years ago on our last visit to the Gold Coast and loved it so much we decided to return. ||Wow - hasn’t caravanning changed!||The good - staff very friendly, helpful, happy and cheerful. Roads/curbs/gutters/site concrete and/or site mats are great! ||Position of the grassed movie area in relation to bistro/bar, waterpark, mini golf and tennis is terrific. ||Average bar/bistro prices and everything ordered was delicious (but cocktails take a looooong time to be made so don’t arrive thirsty!) also be aware that the bistro runs on a reduced menu in peak season (really disappointing as we had decided to eat at the bistro because of the menu advertised online).||Amenities modern, clean and well positioned (exactly what I would expect from NRMA). ||Pools busy and basic with a “pool attendant” at the main pool.||Now my gripe - dogs, dogs, dogs.||The website stated that no dogs would be permitted during peak season - forgive me if I am wrong but are school holidays not peak season?||We were placed on a site with a “mat” not a slab which had obviously had a dog on it previously. The mat was covered in dog hair and I found myself swallowing clarityne every 12 hours to cope!!!||Also would the deck area outside the bistro and grass area where movies are played not be “communal?” Fine to have it written in the rules but who looks out for it? We had to leave a communal area twice due to a dog.||Why should I have to tell a dog owner that they should not have their dog in an area and risk a confrontation? Plus in between my allergic reaction and my 5 year olds complete distress it is impossible for me to get near enough to tell the owner to grow some human brains. ||So upsetting that caravanning is all about bringing your dog -  I gave NRMA Parks a second go but not again!  ||The

Super freindly best experience with everyone here
I will be back without hesitation

Great place to bring your kids

Nice place where to stay

Stayed here many times but this time round was a bit disappointing we had a outdated cabin that had alot of German cockroaches that was not nice to have to see,and the bistro had messaged to say it has short supply's of food cause we booked the night to dine in which again was disappointing never has that happen before we where looking forward to have dine in there

The resort is great, but the mattresses in our room were horrible. Having an infant means you don't get much sleep, but with these mattresses I got no sleep. I did complain, but got no response.

Booked one of the family single room bungalow was clean great service fresh towels delivered every 2nd day and friendly staff.

Very clean and great for kids

Has lot of activities to keep kids occupied. Stayed at a suite, stay was decent and check in check out was a breeze

Awesome holiday park! Our site was clean and close to all amenities. The pool and service here is fantastic! They are so accommodating to families especially activities for children.

Great family park. Close to everything. Walking distance to Harbour Town Outlet Shops. It’s basically across the road. Plenty of restaurants around the Holiday resort to choose from.
Treasure island has its own restaurant and bar.
So much for the kids to do there and definitely will not get bored.
The larger slightly elevated sites with concrete slabs where we were are the best, as if it rains those in the lower lying experience ponding. Price point high however it was Christmas and to be expected for such a fantastic place.

Massive shout out to the staff! Especially skye from the bistro and Jamie from activities! What incredible souls! They made me and my family feel like apart of their family and made our stay wholesome.
Rooms where very out dated and the whole grounds need to be cleaned up but other than that it’s amazing! The amenities are fantastic.and the pools are great for relaxing as well as having fun!

Great place fun for all the cabins are great as well as the sites. The rec room staff are great but during contests it’s gone downhill with new owners. Like why are you making it a who gets cheered the most contest? It makes people with barely anyone in the crowd feel upset. It’s became a who has the most friends in the crowd comps now.

Great place to stay. We were in an upstairs room. Bed and pillows were so comfortable. I just wasn’t aware that these were located in a caravan park (resort as advertised) there were screaming kids which took away the “quiet night out” plan.

This place was great. Until I decided to go and order myself a cocktail because I was a bit depressed and thought I'd treat myself. I asked the bar lady what time it closes, and she began nicely by saying, "the restaurant closes at..." then I politely interrupted with, "oh no the bar", to which she responded in an extremely sarcastic, angry, smart ass tone, "well if you let me finish LOVE". At that point this review was already written, sealed and sent in my head. Place would have got 5 stars if not for that.

We booked this park as it was the closest we could get to our business conference that was pet friendly. The sites are on the smaller side and its a very busy park, however the facilities are amazing for the families that stay with little kids. There's plenty to do and the restaurant is awesome. The bathrooms are clean and modern and the shower cubicles are massive. Recommended for families 10/10.

Fantastic place especially if you have children with you. Amenities are awesome. We stayed in a studio apartment as we were catching up with friends from NSW who were caravaning. The cafe is great food is awesome and staff are amazing

Very well kept park with great staff . Awesome food , kids loved the place.

Great park, stayed here several times starting around 16 years ago. However this time in our caravan on a ensuite site, Considering the price without discount would be around $100 per night it is definitely about $50 too much . When I arrived sites either side were occupied with cars parked close to the road and building on the other side made it very difficult to reverse van in, maintenance guys should be more aware that kids can appear from nowhere on foot or buggy and adhere to the speed limit that is required of guests instead of zipping around in their buggy like they are in a supercar race.Also blocked sink in ensuite on arrival.

Although tight to get into, our premium site was a good size, close to the playground, main pool and amenities. The kids loved the water slide, jumping pillow and Putt Putt. There are heaps of free kids activities from Wednesdays to Sundays, even outside the school holidays. The Bear Grylls Survivor Challenges weren't running the weekend we attended, so I would recommend checking with the staff before booking if your kids are wanting to do this. The Resort itself is within easy walking distance of Harbour Town and local retailers, and there's a good seafood store just across the road. The staff are friendly and helpful, and with a great cafe/restaurant on site, all your needs are catered for. We will certainly return in future!

We stay here regularly for soccer comps. Very close to everything yet far enough out of the rat race of the glitter strip.
Great for kids to safely get around. Table tennis, night movies, games room, tennis/ basketball court and a too mini golf course. The studio rooms  are very comfortable the van sites are a little tight. Our last stay was a simple one sleeping in the back of the Ute under the stars. 🤩

We had a life guard name Mia and couldn’t say anything better about her. Great service and even better attitude. Thanks Mia!

We had heard really great things and thought this was one of the top holiday parks in the country but we were sorely disappointed. Rooms were quite dated and unclean. We had to move some of the furniture and underneath was pretty filthy. Double beds were extremely soft we completely sunk in them.. we ended up sleeping on the two available bunk beds in the kids room which were better but still uncomfortable.. The restaurant staff were friendly as were reception. Overall the whole park needs to be updated/ renovated for the prices they charge. We stayed not long ago at Coconut Holiday Park in Cairns which was far nicer and had excellent facilities and was cheaper…

Highly recommended, it's a lovely getaway spot, the pools, spas, activities for the kids are amazing. The staff are friendly and helpful. I took my caravan for a couple of nights with my two fur babies, they even have a doggy park gated for playtime.

We had a good weekend there .

Usually stay here for family vacations and have a great time have been coming for YEARS but this year was a bit of a bummer.
We stayed for 2 weeks
If it could happen it just about did
There was construction in the park so nice early 7am wakeups
Shower broke
Light broken
Floor drain was broke cut my foot open
Ant infestation coming in our kitchen got in our food in the cupboard
Each of these was easily fixed except the floor drain that was left broken for our entire stay
And I was booked into 2 different cabins for the 13 days as they didn’t have 1 available for the whole stay (which I didn’t mind as it’s happened before and we are flexible with our stay
5 nights in a cheaper room
8 nights in an expensive cabin with a washer and dryer bbq Foxtel etc almost double the price per night

Staff asked us if we didn’t mind switching the night around
So 8 night in cheap
5 night expensive
And they would offer me $$$ refund
Fine by me $$$ in our pockets

We stay
Leave get home and ask for our refund
Only to be told
No you can’t have that
After much debate
I was offered a partial amount refund $$
This was the most annoying part of the entire holiday being offered compensation staff changing my room only to be denied and then treated like a criminal when I asked for the money that I was owed

Great park centrally located restaurant kids water 💦 park pet friendly and friendly staff 😎🙏

After just 4 hours we new we would be coming back. They have probably the best customer service we have experienced in Australia, amazing staff, facilities, cleanliness, pools, slides, kids activities, trivia, food, big screen tv, the list goes on and on.

The only downside of this place is that the size of of the plots are a little bit on the smaller side. But given the location, it's understandable.

Amazing place!

Friendly staff great environment

Our kids loved the play areas and all the facilities. Especially the mini golf. Pizzas as great too 👍

Amazing place to stay with kids.

It's ok if you want to spend all day in a crowded caravan park by the pool or playing tennis. Kids will probably enjoy the facilities.But way too far from the beach. Shops are about 800m wallk so not too bad. Excellent restaurant. If you're on the Gold coast you want to walk to the beach.

Great facilities, they had heaps of activities for my three kids. It was an excellent stay for a long weekend in our camper.

We will definitely be coming back again.

Noisy and busy. Our van site was horrible and the construction fences were in the way. Great if you have kids. Not great for couples.

What an amazing stay !!!
Resort had everything a family could want , had dinner a couple nights in the bistro, affordable great food and beautiful customer service, all the staff were amazing friendly and always went above and beyond!
Only issue is it went to quickly!!
Pools where great ! Big screen TV was killer!
Thank you for having us ! We will be back !!

Two nights to suit my stay, very busy

Beautiful stuff , clean rooms, welcoming recreation. Thank you 🙏🏽

Great family accomodations. Came to goldcoast for a theme park holiday and it decided to rain. The holiday park had plenty of activities and things for kids to keep them happy. Great friendly staff!!!

Overall a great little park. Check in was nice and easy and staff were super friendly and helpful.

Our site was pretty small and we did only just fit. Having a concrete pad next to our camper is no problem, but the part you actually park on has a really small concrete pad with ramp, and the way our camper is constructed meant we had to park on the ramp section to allow enough room for our camper to fold back. I noticed a couple caravans around us had the same issue with the wheels being on the ramp. This does make levelling really difficult, i'd love to recommend either removing the small section of concrete slab on the left hand side of sites, or extending them to the same size as the slab on the right

Other than that the amenities are probably some of the best we've used and had a sense of luxury about them. The shower heads, whilst delightfully big, have really low water pressure because of their size.

The laundry could definitely fit more washing machines and judging by the line for the machines in the afternoon, they would be well used. 3 washing machines with one out of order just isn't really enough for a caravan park that big.

Bistro was lovely. We happened to go when the trivia was on and that was pretty fun. Meals were pretty good, although the fish on the fish and chips was a tad overdone.

Great dog friendly park.
Staff member Ji was extremely helpful and welcoming. Recommend to another 2 couples who also chose to stay for 2 nights

great service

Amazing for families particularly during their school holiday program. Lots of pools and playgrounds. Great amenities. Slow service at the cafe/restaurant.

Strongly suggest if you rent out a cabin bring your own mattress sleeping on an old gym mat is not good for anyone bring mould killer for the windows and blinds and a plunger as the bathroom sink was blocked as soon as we got in the cabin . The activities for the kids are great most of our service was great too  . Cabin was a real let down over all

We stayed here during the last school holidays - and although our stay was cut short due to our camping gear not handling the weather we had an amazing time! Cleanest facilities of any holiday park we've ever used, so much for the kids (and adults) to do, great friendly staff, could not fault a thing! All looking forward to booking another site once we've sorted out our gear properly!

The best place to go on the Gold Coast if on holiday with kids... The studio room was perfect for my daughter and I on a shirt stay!

Great little mini vacation, close to dfo

Stayed on powered caravan site (305) and throughly enjoyed the large space we were allocated. The park was awesome with a huge LED screen to watch nightly movies on while sitting back in a nice bean bag. 3 awesome pools and close enough to walk to Coles and Harbour Town. Would highly recommend. Unfortunately only let down was lack of internet and WIFI.

I highly recommend this place. It has good facilities and It is a base for visiting Dreamworld, Warner Bros. Movie World and Wet 'n" Wild.

Always a reliable stop on the way north. Dog friendly and clean. We chose an ensuite site this time and it was totally worth it to have a long hot shower after a big day driving.

This is a fabulous park right in the best part of the GC. Close to Harbour Town shops. Great staff and very clean.

El camping es amplio y limpio pero solo tiene una cocina con cuatro fuegos para todo el camping.Ni siquiera jabón para fregar los platos. Este camping esta hecho para la gente con grandes autocaravanas pero no para la gente que pernocta en van o en coche. Solo recomendable para una noche.

We've stayed here a few times this year, and we love it! They have great facilities for kids, such as jumping pillow, a few pools, hot tubs/spa, ping pong, basketball/tennis, mini golf and parts for hire. In the holidays they also have additional activities the kids can do, some are free, some cost. It's close to Harbourtown if you love to shop. The staff are super friendly, the cleaners keep the amenities immaculate and its just overall a wonderful place to stay! They also do a free sausage sizzle for their guests.

Great service, the staff are wonderful, but it doesn't look like it's been updated since our last visit 2 years ago and things of convenience are missing from the cabins - like a 6 sleeper cabin has a table for 4 only, no shelf in the shower cubicle to put shampoo etc, no hanging place for a tea towel, inadequate sink space for dirty dishes. It's a shame but it just needs some TLC to come back to awesome.

Such a great place. Lots of activities for kids & families. Everyday is filled with activities the kids can participate in.. Staff are AMAZING.. Always welcome with a smile, wave 👋 & hello. If any problems they were dealt with immediately. Nothing was ever a problem. We would stay there again without a doubt

All good

Great place to stay.
The friendly and relaxed atmosphere added to the good weekend. The staff ate a credit to your business. Always happy, willing to have a chat and help in any way they could.

What a great campground. Very nice pirate-style site. Everything very tidy and clean. You can't see the nearby roads here. The outlet is only a 10-minute walk away. There is so much on offer for children in this campground. We can only recommend it to everyone. Thank you for a very nice stay.

Just a visit this time to see interstate mates, but great facilities!!

Absolutely loved our stay here.
Had such a nice friendly vibe.
There is endless activities every day for the kids and all the staff in the activity's are amazing with them!
Our little ones didn't want to leave.
Would be perfect to add a gym here for the parents!

Room and park facitities are getting a bit old and jaded. Staff were wonderful, friendly and helpful.

Absolutely highly recommended.  Fantastic place for family's I have gone to most family resorts on the Gold Coast and this is my favourite 😍.  Staff beyond  exceptional and facilities just brilliant

Camped here in the tents with the family, kids loved it, good spot, close to all conveniences.

Stayed here for a week
Kids loved it
Saved me a trip to wet a wild as kids are happy to stay in the park

Still there and grandkuds are loving it

This holiday park is the absolute best! Highly recommend it to everyone. 🏕️

Great caravan park with the works, staff are friendly just need to book certain entertainment like the tennis court, bikes etc putt putt was great.

Great place to stay, we had a powered site.

Our family have been coming here now for around 5 years. From camping to glamping we are never disappointed with the staff and facilities. Great for kids of all ages.

We stayed on a powered site, the sites were a little tight however the rest of the parks excellent facilities make this kind of redundant lol. There are a number of fairly decent pools, water slide, spas, tennis courts, on site bar and restaurent, kids games room, go cart hire,  and so many activities over the school holidays.for the kids. Not too far from Cavill Ave either (about 20min drive) if u want to visit main strip. The staff were great, easy check in. We will definitely go back to this park in the future

The staff are all super nice , , soft grass , beautiful pools and facilities , big lush shower heads. Tarnz from house keeping gave me a lift to my van just cos she saw me carrying some ice, beautiful bar to sit in and " work from home"  oasis right in the heart of the gold coast . couldn't ask for a better place to stay . way better than setting yourself up in an apartment or Air B and B

Resort is very tired. Our Lagoon Villa had a lot of damage in room, bathroom was filled with mould! Wifi really poor, not many tv channels available (not even free to air). Facilities in the park were great for kids, again very dated though and needing refurbishment. We lost water for hours during our stage, a lot of construction occuring. The reception was always friendly and allowed an early check in.

Beautiful, clean, Amazing service

Took my little one stayed in the unit and she loved it,
room got everything we need, funny smell at first but opened the window for 10 mins and it's fine. sound proof wasn't really good so can hear ppl walking talking outside the door,
plenty for kids to do, close to shops and restaurant.
will definitely come back for another stay.

Need to hire groundskeepers, overgrown and stinks like bat sh&@,,sites are tiny and no after hours staff to control noisy people, won’t stay there again,

Très bonne expérience pour cette première fois dans la Gold Coast. L'unité était parfaite et très propre. Aucun souci avec l'environnement. Bien situé dans l'ensemble. Et le parc agréable, même s'il faut mettre un bémol : il ne me semble pas adapté si vous venez avec un ado seul. Il va malgré tout s'y ennuyé. C'est plus pour les plus petits.|Le gros point noir est la couverture WIFI, ce n'est pas bon du tout. C'est pur cette raison que je n'y retournerais pas.

Been here twice now.
First time was absolutely amazing, we have recommended to multiple friends/family (some family have since booked).
Most recent stay - checked out yesterday, was not as good.
We were told check in was 3pm, we rang around 3hrs beforehand to let them know we would be a little early as we were travelling 12 hours, with a time difference/traffic etc it was difficult to judge exactly when we would arrive.
We were made to feel crappy for arriving an hour early (check in info pamphlets say 2pm though?), then when attempting to check in at 3.10pm we were told the site was still not ready and spoken down to in regards to it (also travelling with 2 young children).

Internet didn't work at all, and we had to connect the TV to our mobile phones to stream on TV's.

Throughout the 5 night stay we found multiple German cockroaches wondering around and 2 small black cochroaches made their way in to our children's zip locked bag with their tooth brushes.
Upon our packing and our clean up on check out morning, we went to move the bin (first time all stay as we had mostly used our own bags to discard rubbish each day), we had at least 50 German cochroaches run from under the bin - clearly it had not been moved or cleaned for quiet some time prior to our arrival!
On top of this, one of these cockroaches made its way into our luggage, and ran out of a suitcase as we unpacked the car, thankfully I saw it and killed it immediately as we have built a new house and do not want a roach infestation, and German cochroaches are the hardest to get rid of!

We are planning to visit again and hope the next visit will have the staff be more friendly and accommodating to those travelling so far, and that the rooms will be roach free.

Aside from the check in issues and the roach issue, the resort had great pools, lots of kid friendly activities and the bar/restaurant is fantastic!

Great kids club. Terrific location easy to find close to theme parks. Quiet and clean. Lots of trees.

Our stay at NRMA Treasure Island Holiday Resort really surprised us...  On arrival, it's in the middle of an industrial retail estate, which didn't look good, so we were skeptical, but everything else about the place makes up for this.  We camped and were located in a great spot opposite the splash park, the facilities were always clean, the camp kitchen had everything you needed, the pools were fantastic (even a spa,) not that we used it much but the kids entertainment seemed engaging and fun and the staff...  They make this place.  We were their on Xmas day when the tornado hit.  The camp site on Boxing Day looked like a bomb had hit it.  The way the staff rallied together, the garden guy was in on his day off and before midday the place was back to looking beautiful.  It's a real credit to them, along with the fact they were super friendly.  Coles is just over the road.  BCF around the corner.  A short drive to the beach front or tram to head into Surfers.  We ended up leaving 2 days early due to the weather however, the manager came round to make sure everyone was ok and offered a refund for the 2 nights due to unexpected circumstances.

Nice park. Close to everything.

Great for a family with children, plenty to do. We stayed for 6 nights and was extremely impressed  with the two male life guards that made our time there so much more enjoyable. Pat on the back for their energy and enthusiasm. Over all extremely happy with our stay here, gave us parents a break while the kids always had something to do. Thanks again

Nice place and facilities. Staff did well to deal with recent power outage from Xmas day storm. We hope you are back up and running.

Amazing place to stay with younger kids! Lots of activities and places for them to explore. Gave my wife and I the downtime to read and relax that we really needed. Staff were polite and enthusiastic - they really give the place a community feel. Pools were fantastic for kids just starting to swim as well as for older ones. Grounds were always clean. Will definitely be back!

Nice location but pretty expensive. Wi-Fi isn’t working at all. Either really slow or not working.

The overall park was fantastic, it had everything we needed without having to leave. Our room however was awful. We stayed in the safari tent and the deck, outdoor area and designated car space was unusable due to the bird droppings, the smell was horrendous and over a 4 day stay we had to wash our car 3 times due to damages.

Been here many times over the past few years I have got to say this time  was disappointed, stayed in the eco-tents the deck was covered in bird poo, my car got covered to, and the smell of ibis was disgusting couldn’t sit out on the deck because of this. Some staff were rude to the kids, bouncing pillow closed at 7pm on a weekend, no kids disco come on. Don’t think we will be back as a group again

DON'T BOOK A PREMIUM CARAVAN SITE. Overall the park was fine, the staff were nice, the park is located well to access the Gold Coast big attractions, and they have several pools, mini golf etc. The premium site we were assigned, however, was terrible (photos attached). There was a half falling over fence at the back that was ziptied together, a large piece of old rusty metal leaning against it to keep it up, as well as warning tape around the side where they were obviously half way through some type of work. Save your money and just book a standard site, they seemed much nicer.

I recently had a regrettable experience at the NRMA Caravan Park, and I feel compelled to share my disappointment. During our stay, both my husband's phone and mine were stolen from inside the supposedly secure kitchen area, which was locked and accessible only via a key code.

What makes this incident particularly concerning is that the Google Maps tracking indicated the theft occurred in the middle of the night. This suggests that the thief may have had knowledge of the key code, raising questions about the security of the facility.

Upon reporting the incident to the manager, we were met with a shocking lack of empathy. The manager was uncooperative and refused to show us the security camera footage, leaving us in the dark about the incident. This indifferent response, even in the face of a potential security breach involving their staff, was deeply unsettling.

Regrettably, I cannot recommend NRMA based on this distressing experience. The lack of concern for guest security and the uncooperative attitude of the manager left a lasting negative impression on what was supposed to be a pleasant stay.

We stayed in a garden villa for our stay and found the park to be a little dated and the room we staying in was old and in need of some repairs and a refresh. Kids allergies played up severely while in the rooms. Pools, waterpark and kids activities were great as well as the cafe/restaurant.

Noisy on the highway, but close to everything so thats an advantage with a disadvantage. The sites are tight. We have a small caravan and found it difficult to get out (The streets are dead ends so hard to 'drive through')
The amenities were great. Best showers Ive had!
Lots of activities and pools to choose from and lots of kids around.

6 kids with special needs and after almost 2 weeks and paying an extra 2 weeks they kick us out of the park would not recommend if you have adhd and autism children really bad management 1 guy is good the other managers stuck up as hell

Need to keep bin chickens off your dining room tables.

Another successful trip to Treasure Island! This year was our 3rd Halloween in a row and our 4th booking overall here.

Don't hesitate to book here. The kids are happy with endless things to do and the adults are happy because the kids are happy!  There is a great deck area you can relax with a cuppa or drink and watch the kids.

Cook yourself or the on-site restaurant is reasonably priced with good variety. Or so many other places to eat very close by!

The staff are the best! Warm and friendly. Nothing is too much trouble..

Location is perfect! Close to supermarkets within walking distance..

We had an unfortunate incident with accidental damage done to our unit from my grandson who is physically and intellectually impaired and the staff were compassionate and understanding..  This could have ruined our weekend but instead only made us love Treasure Island and the staff even more.

We will be back for Halloween 2024!

My 2nd visit with 12yrs between. It's really gone down, not their fault but totally surrounded by skyscrapers just ruined what little view I had between very small lots. It's very expensive for a patch of grass where the noise is so extreme.

The cafe was gorgeous and what amazing food. The main pool was closed for the majority of our stay with no prior notice.

I know it's not their fault where they are located, or even that they need to cram you in like sardines. But to charge what they do for off-season, there's no way I could get it to 5star.

I will be back.

Our stay with NRMA treasure island , was outstanding .
We celebrated our sons 7th birthday here and expectation was exceeded , customer service was exceptional , the villa was comfortable with aircon in every room and ensuite in each room .
My favourite part of our stay was the pools and the spa , our children could have fun all weekend and enjoy themselves at the pool area which opens up at 7 am every morning.
The water parks ( water ) is controlled by a button so if it’s off you can simply turn on by the push of a button.
The jumping pillow was a great way to burn some energy at the eod before we headed back to the villa in the evening.
Thankyou treasure island for a fantastic 10/10 weekend .
You are our favourite place to stay on the Gold Coast .

Awesome family stay.  We stayed in the cabins,  very comfortable,  excellent facilities. Heaps of activities everyday for the kids,  great food and drinks area

Great place for a family holiday with kids of various ages. Trent sites are spacious and they even have astro turf for your awning making life way easier. Pools and bouncey pillow are fab! Kids club was great to break up the day.

The kids and I went to NRMA Treasure Island Resort on the Gold Coast this week. I can't fault it at all. We spent a week there and the staff were all amazing, the park facilities are great and it's conveniently located for the theme parks. One of the stand-outs is the Bistro and Bar. Fantastic food, great drinks, and friendly service. Another feature is all the activities for the kids. Not just the kids club with art, video game competitions, but also the jumping pillow, pools and movie nights on a huge screen outdoors. We will definitely be back again, at the express request of the kids.

Fantastic atmosphere, very friendly staff and great variety of accommodation at good value.

I love everything about this place.  Loads of accommodation choices, friendly staff, great casual restaurant with simple bar.  There is a family atmosphere here and although my children have grown,  the atmosphere keeps me coming back.

We had a fantastic stay at Treasure Island resort this week. Super friendly staff, heaps to do.

Great place lots of kids activities the pool is heated lots to do if you want to have a few day's in your caravan or whatever your using the only downsides we're you can hear the highway at times
And the the showers take forever to warm up the heating system just sucks
Definitely recommend if you have kids

We loved it.....
We would come back....
No complaints here

Great park with awesome facilities and amenities.

We recently stayed in #12 studio unit which is adjacent to the staircase. The bright lights in the staircase shine straight through into the room and there are no blinds so we didn't sleep all night as it was like trying to sleep in the day time. When we checked out i let the reception know about this and its like she knew about it and just laughed it off. Apart from that the room was clean and comfortable just bright at night. I would definitely suggest the bistro bar great coffee and breakfast.

If you're after a place with an electric atmosphere with plenty for the kids to do then this is the place for you. There are many options for accommodation to suit your budget including the option to camp. Activities are held throughout the day for the kids and a bar and restaurant for the adults to get a drink while watching their kid/s play on the big pillow. The staff are all amazing and if you need to know where to find anything in the area they can point you in the right direction. We will definitely be coming back.

What an awesome place! Wish we could of stayed longer, staff were outstandingly kind and welcoming, amenities very clean and distributed throughout the park and such a long list of fun and engaging activities for the whole family! Thank you guys for making our stay the very best it could of possibly been :)

Beautiful and exciting! Wonderful staff.

Travelling with the 4 year old toddler, absolutely loved the resort the kids entertain themselves with all the activities available. A+ to the cleaners the cabin we stayed in was spotless and the amenities available was amazing. Resort staff were so friendly and helpful  saying hello every time with huge smiles, I Highly recommend this resort. Thanks for making our holiday escape amazing.

Wow, it has options in park and location, close to so many things... Everything!
So many options!
Staff Great!
Atmosphere!
Everything Convenience in and near!
Wow, great spot!
.
I can be a critical person. I give it a 9.9, mini golf Clubs weren't 100%, what do you expect, with few Ratbag Children playing.

Wow what an amazing experience, thankyou, friendly staff great meals so much do if you dont want to leave.a great experience and will definatly be back and recommend to friends and family. Well done team nrma reasure island from the Morris family

Booked a ensuite site - generous sized caravan site at the back of the park near Biggera Creek. Ensuite clean and well maintained - visited as a solo traveler however could see how this place would be fantastic for young families- will be encouraging my kids/grandys to stay here - thoroughly recommend

We really enjoy this park have stayed a few times in the last 2 years centrally located for our needs & family bus stop not to far away Harbour Town very close, lovely staff clean camp sites. kitchen & amenities we thought it would be noisy on Brisbane Rd but the traffic certainly didn't keep us awake, we will definitely be back  great park for families & the cafe is also great 😀😀

We stayed 4 nights as visiting family, we travel with our 2 Kelpies, really nice off lead enclosure.
Amenities are clean, enough washing machines to not have to wait, great place if you have small kids, plenty of things for them to do.
Only issue we had we were told we would have to move sites (need a small wall around the dump site as its not very pleasent when having breakfast and someone empties their toilet 2 metres away from you) for our second and subsequent nights as they were fully booked out that was not the case as the site we moved from was still empty 2 days later and there were plenty of empty sites left.
Great location walking distance to Harbourtown, Coles etc
Would stay here again

Awesome! Customer Service was above and beyond, location is central to everything, cabin was great. Bistro was full of tasty options both eat in and takeaway! We did theme parks but you could stay in the park and never ever get bored it’s packed with entertainment options from mini golf to multiple pools! 5 stars, thanks for a great holiday ⭐️ 🏖

Stayed in a powered caravan site. Backed onto one of the main pools. Sites are very well maintained, clean, the astroturf pad is a great touch underfoot with the awning set up.

Heads up, some of the sites are very tight to back into if you have neighbours, or people have parked directly in front of their van. Limited turning space when backing in. Other than that the staff are amazing and go out of their way to help. The bisto is expensive(ish) but the food is nice and the coffee if great.

Great facilities for the kids and close to tons of amenities.

100% recommend staying here.

Stayed in budget pet friendly accommodation, which was really appreciated at last minute, a/c not working was the only negative.  Would recommend.

great park. nice clean spacious amenities. good location. plenty of pools and spa to choose from

The Deluxe Villa is well equipped.
Lovely gardens around the park.
Great pools with heated water.

Great campsite….great activities for our grandchildren…..highly recommend

I would definitely stay here again. It was central to most things in the reception staff and maintenance staff were absolutely lovely and nothing was too much for them they went above and beyond

The only downside was the cabins on weekends people were quite noisy and maybe the longer stay guests could be away from the cabins but the sites were good at it had a tropical feeling and the spas were amazing

A Doggy wash would be great and bigger off leash area with water park.

Definitely would be back

Enjoyed our 2 night stay. Very reasonably priced accommodation. The beds were soooo comfy, plenty of hot water. I wish we had better weather so we could have enjoyed the pools and water park because they looked great, but we'll be back again in the future.

The best service/staff I’ve been anywhere! It was my Son’s 8th birthday and after a very hard week of the loss of his grandad/only father figure, they made him feel so special and gifted him with a go kart and slushie coupon. All staff members were super friendly and helpful which makes the whole experience just so much better. The park is awesome, everything you could want and need right here, if you didn’t want to you wouldn’t have to leave. So much to do for the kids! We stayed in the safari tents which were epic! Big! Comfy! Aircon! Just great! Thanks for the great memories!!!

Really good value for money, lovely staff, lots of activities

Despite the lovely renovations for the studio units, we were so horribly disappointed. The bed was so soft that my 30kg daughter woke with a back spasm. I ended up sleeping on the couch seating on the floor. The front desk staff said the beds were 6 months old.
The bathroom and bedroom windows have no blinds, it was like sleeping in a bright floodlit field.
The room is on a main road so traffic noise is significant.
The second night we were there, the maintenance staff kindly taped a garbage bag and drilled a towel across the window (thank you!), we put the pedestal fan on high in front of the door facing the main road to create white noise and slept on the fold out couch together so we could sleep without our spines bending painfully. We love this spot but do not recommend the studio units.
Through this all the maintenance staff and front desk were great.

Great for families amenities very good sites are a bit tight otherwise excellent

Jeremy and all the staff made for a wonderful experience while staying at Treasure Island. Great, clean, family friendly ammenities and service.

Lovely food great location brilliant weekend getaway

Stayed 4 nights during mid July on powered site with ensuite and with adult child with grandkids in glamping  tent. Other than some difficulties upon arrival at reception with getting what we booked, staff were friendly and helpful. Facility is dated. Wate-works play area wasn’t working, but there were other things to keep children occupied. Bonus was the children’s activity program. Very good from little children’s view. Very convenient to have a bar and bistro onsite, but meals weren’t great.

Fantastic tourist park ideally located 15 minutes from SeaWorld and 20 minutes from MovieWorld. Great food in the bistro with friendly staff. Plenty of activities for the kids and us bigger kids, tennis, basketball, putt putt golf, swimming and more. Holidays and weekends can be busy which is understandable but midweek is nice and generally quiet. Highly recommended!

Best place we have ever camped.
So much to do with the kids,we will be back.

Amazing place. Amazing staff. A bit busy than we would have liked and some guests didn't follow rules like riding bikes and scooters after hours. But loved our stay. Thanks everyone.

Seriously, after the NRMA through me under a Bus, taking 3 months to repair my company's vehicle, costing over 58k in loss of income, then refused to claim of the at fault party, RACQ. THEN HIT ME UP FOR A POSITIVE REVIEW!
After 30years as a member, multiple vehicles insured including special needs, disability NDIS training, they completely threw me under the bus to save their competition money, nearly costing me my business at the same time.
It was expected, I have seen it done to numerous clients over the years, all to save the insurance companies money, over the lives of the people they are supposed to insure

Absolutely amazing.  Will be back x

Good atmosphere. Nice food. Close to great wholesale shopping centre

Very disappointed with lies we were told about sites.  We stayed for nearly 5 weeks and then we had to move out for 2 nights due to the camp being fully booked which was fine but we weren’t given the same ensuite site we had been told we would have when we came back to stay for another 4 weeks. We were lied to, about why that was.  We were told there was a large camper trailer coming in which was not true as everything that has come in has been smaller than us. We have stayed another 4 weeks and had to move which is fine but the caravan that has come in on the site we had been on is a lot smaller than us again. We are moving out again for 4 nights which is fine, and then we are coming back for at least another 2 weeks. Not sure what site they will give us this time and the lies they will tell why we are on the smaller site and the smaller vans on the larger sites.
For the nights we have had to move out we have stayed at the Big 4 and they have been amazing with moving vans around to accommodate our size van.

Great park.  Will come again

Very clean, very friendly staff, great entertainment for the kids, loads of shops and restaurants around.

Great family fun
Food restaraunt
Loved it

Plenty to do for the kids, close to theme parks and 15 min from Surfers... Great place to stay!

Busy popular park with good facilities. Includes villas, cabins and caravan sites. Close to Harbortown and a coles store.

Not enough hooks behind shower doors to hang up clothes

This place is awesome!
It’s dog friendly but only in some parts!
It’s incredible for kids to run around and play.
Highly recommend for caravans, camping trailer, tents, as one half of the ground is cement for parking car next to on your spot and the other part has fake grass.

Great place very laid back and clean plenty of fun stuff for the kids and adults 😀

This was a good place to stay. We stayed in a 3 bedroom cabin with one of the rooms containing 2 bunk beds.   We had a BBQ area just out the back of our unit which we used to cook on for a couple of nights of our stay. I found some of the pools/ spas a little bit dated but they were in good working order. There was a jumping pillow and  a bistro type area where you could buy meals and drinks. They had a cocktail of the day on offer also. We did have to supply our own spatula and sissors as our unit didn't have any, but apart from this our stay was an excellent one. Harbor Town was just around the corner with shopping facilities close by. About a 15/20 min drive to Seaworld, Movie World, Dreamworld and Outback Spectacular.

As the CEO of a local charity, I attempted to advocate for a woman in domestic violence. Sadly Treasure Island management were not interested in helping to support this woman who had been displaced.

I only requested a two week stay, while we organized alternative accommodation, however the manager was unwilling to to be empathetic. We were happy to cover all costs, but again her response was that 'this is a holiday resort not temporary accommodation'. While I respect and understand her point of view, it is disappointing and frankly sad that this happens to a number of women experiencing hardship.

Domestic violence, and mental health issues are on the rise in our society, and it is unfortunate that there are still businesses and people that do not understand the complexities and pain these victims face. I will pass on to our network of other charities and support services that Treasure Island resort will not be a recommended option to support people in need.

Visited friends staying there. Had a great meal. Checked facilities. Amazing variety of activities for kids.

This is just a review for the coffee.

We asked for a double shot latte and cappuccino, 3 quarters full. Got filled to the brim (only about a total of 3 people in whole restaurant mind you)

Asked to be remade as it was watery and weak.

Second coffee's were filled correctly, but cappuccino had no chocolate. Coffee was burnt and just tasted terrible.

I don't do reviews much, but this year when you're paying over $5 a coffee it's disappointing and ridiculous.

I recently stayed at Treasure Island Caravan Park for 4 nights for a work conference. I would highly recommend this park to anyone looking for a great place to stay on the Gold Coast.

The park is located in a great spot, just a short drive from all of the major theme parks and attractions. It is also reasonably close drive to the beach, which is perfect for swimming, sunbathing, and surfing.

The park itself is very clean and well-maintained. The staff are friendly and helpful, and they go out of their way to make sure that you have a great stay.

The accommodation at Treasure Island Caravan Park is varied and there is something to suit everyone's needs. I stayed in a two-bedroom villa, which was spacious and comfortable. The villa had everything I needed, including a fully equipped kitchen, BBQ, a TV, and a private balcony.

The park also has a wide range of facilities, including a swimming pool, a spa, a tennis court, and a kids' club. There is also a restaurant on site, which serves good food and is very reasonably priced.

Overall, we had a fantastic time at Treasure Island Caravan Park. We would definitely recommend this park to anyone looking for a great place to stay on the Gold Coast.

Here are some specific things that we loved about the park:

* The location was perfect. We were close to all of the major theme parks and attractions, as well as the beach.
* The staff were friendly and helpful. They went out of their way to make sure that we had a great stay.
* The accommodation was spacious and comfortable. We had everything we needed, including a fully equipped kitchen, a TV, and a private balcony.
* The park had a wide range of facilities, including a swimming pool, a spa, a tennis court, and a kids' club.
* The licensed restaurant on site served  good food.

I would definitely recommend Treasure Island Caravan Park to anyone looking for a great place to stay on the Gold Coast.

Absolutely amazing place staff were so friendly!!!

10/10 keen to go again

You need vending machines though for after hrs snacks lol ...im a bf mum I get hungry 😂😂😂😂

great service all round from all staff at reception and at the bistro where so awesome deal with. food was rwally great priced and was so yummy, really made the trip experience much easier on me. Massive thank you to the house keeping staff very helpful need anything and bang its done A++ thank you
side note people with young kids, very safe place and reception gives out free spare prams to use at anytime, i borrowed 2x for 10 days to use all round Brisbane, the theme parks and gold coast shopping malls. highly recommended this resort to all. booking again for next year A++, happy NZ family

Excellent overall experience. Theres a lot of activities for the kids if the parents want a lazy day and chill. Close to shops, etc.

Beautiful place to stay, very friendly staff, only thing is maybe have the sites (caravan parking) numbered a bit better, had to end up asking a staff member where it was, otherwise great place
